hero.tagline: Helping you create stunning websites for your café, restaurant, clinic, workshop & portfolio — fast, modern & mobile-friendly.

about.title:
Hello, I'm
Priyas Biswas!
paragraphs: I am a Web Developer & Web Designer with 2+ years of experience creating modern, responsive, and business-focused websites. I've worked with many clients and successfully developed websites for 10+ cafés, 2 clinics, and several restaurants.

I specialize in building websites using modern AI-powered tools and website builders, delivering fast and efficient results. My basic coding knowledge lets me fix technical issues, customize designs, and optimize performance whenever needed.
I focus on clean UI, fast-loading websites, and mobile-friendly designs that improve user experience and help businesses grow online.

cards.desc: Building complete websites for cafés, restaurants, clinics, and personal portfolios using modern AI-powered tools and platforms.
Creating visually stunning, brand-aligned UI/UX designs. Focused on mobile-first, fast-loading, and conversion-optimized layouts.
Using HTML, CSS, and basic coding to fix issues, customize features, and improve website performance for clients post-launch.

process.title: Requirement Discussion
process.desc: Understanding the client's business, goals, and website needs.

process.title: Design Planning
process.desc: Creating layout, structure, and UI design tailored to the brand.

process.title: Website Development
process.desc: Building the website using modern development tools and AI-assisted platforms.

process.title: Customization & Fixes
process.desc: Using coding knowledge to fix issues or customize features if required.

process.title: Testing & Launch
process.desc: Checking responsiveness, performance, usability — then deploying with full client support.

items.name: Secondary Education

items.name: Higher Secondary Education
items.degree: Completed higher secondary education (H.S.), West Bengal Board.

items.name: College (Pursued)
items.degree: Pursued college studies and chose to focus on practical web development experience and real-world client projects — building skills that matter most.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Have a project in mind? Whether it's a café website, restaurant, clinic, or a personal portfolio — I'd love to help bring your vision to life. Let's talk!
